PLOS ONE | https://doi.org/10.1371/journal.pone.0318328 February 7, 2025                                                                                 2 / 24
 PLOS ONE                                                                                     Social credit system construction and overinvestment

Meanwhile, the conclusions have profound policy implications. The social credit system has a
                                           positive policy-oriented effect on the economic behaviors of micro-enterprises and provides a
                                           new perspective for credit improvement.
